title: botrychium zeylanicum
intro: Botrychium zeylanicum, also known as the Ceylon rattlesnake fern, is a species of fern belonging to the genus Botrychium. It is native to Sri Lanka and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Botrychium zeylanicum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
